name: Traditional English Scones
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons butter, chilled and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Butter and flour a large, heavy cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the first five ingredients until well combined.
4. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
5. Stir in the milk, eggs, and egg yolk.
6. Add the raisins if using.
7. Mix until thoroughly incorporated.
8. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface.
9. Roll the dough into a 1-inch thick round.
10. Cut out rounds using a 3-inch round cookie cutter.
11. Gather scraps, re-form into a 1-inch thick round, and cut out more rounds.
12. Transfer the rounds to the prepared cookie sheet, spacing evenly.
13. Brush with glaze.
14. Refrigerate for 15 minutes.
15. Bake until golden brown, about 25 minutes.
16. Serve scones warm with berry preserves.
